rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS WALKER et al VS. PLATINUM CAPITAL GROUP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Aurora Loan Services' Motion For Summary Judgment Or Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 16, 2013, line 10. Defendant Aurora Loan Services' Motion For Summary Judgment Or Summary Adjudication DENIED. Triable issue of material facts exists as to whether hold on foreclosure sale was (1) pending modification review or (2) until June 16, 2013. Fact #43 (fact applicable to all issues). See Declaration of Helen Placente, Ex. H, page 940. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNE REINHART VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A., A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Bank Of America, N.A. And Recontrust Company,N.A.'S Motion To Vacate Or Dissolve Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 16, 2013, line 1. Defendants Bank Of America, N.A. And Recontrust Company,N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Or Dissolve Preliminary Injunction DENIED subject to Plaintiff posting with the Court $136,000 no later than May 17, 2013 by 4 p.m. Proposed order shall reflect that $136,000 can be immediately withdrawn by Defendant. Should Plaintiff fail to post $136,000 with the Court, Preliminary injunction is dissolved. Plaintiff's improper request for reconsideration of August 11, 2011 ruling/January 5, 2012 order is denied. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: VICTORIA PETERSON VS. G. MAZZERA COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant G. Mazzera Company'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 16, 2013, line 9. Defendant G. Mazzera Company'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions Plaintiff provided discovery responses after this motion was filed but before it was heard. Defendant's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $585 (attorney's fees and costs). = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JOVICA MAKSIMOVIC et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. RECONTRUST et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 16, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A., RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to May 22, 2013 on Court's own motion. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JUANITA ROBERTSON et al VS. GREEN TREE SERVICING, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 16, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT GREEN TREE SERVICING, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to June 14, 2013. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than May 31, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, VS. FREDERICK MUELLER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership'S Motion For Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 16, 2013, line 4. Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership's Motion For Judgment Plaintiff's Motion for Judgment pursuant to Stipulation is GRANTED. Plaintiff presented sufficient evidence of violent act and incident reports showing recurring behavior in violation of stipulation by yelling and screaming, causing noise disturbance in common areas, verbal and physical threats, loitering in the common areas, using disparaging, racist epitaphs, accusing staff of engaging in unlawful deviant behavior. Defendant failed to address his recurring non-compliance with 2 of the Stipulation or ability and desire to comply. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. EDWIN KEITH STEPHEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For An Order To Show Cause Re: Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 16, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT EDWIN STEPHEN's Motion For An Order To Show Cause Re: Sanctions Continued to May 17, 2013 to be heard by Honorable Lynn O'Malley Taylor in Department 611 at 9:00 a.m. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: AGP 2619 MISSION LLC VS. SILVIA FERRUSQUIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 16, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT SILVIA FERRUSQUIA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer based on non-payment of contractual rent. Contract with graduated rent increases is attached to the Complaint. Defendant's Counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LILLIE COLLINS VS. JODY NAGY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 16, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT JODY NAGY and THOMAS WALDEN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice provides two ways for remitting payment (1) by mail to "P.O. Box," I compliance with CCP 1161(2) ; and additionally, (2) by pick-up. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CHIN-HO LIAO VS. MIGUEL E. MEDINA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 16, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT MIGUEL MEDINA and MIDELY SANCHEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege term of written contract or any amendments thereto disallowing payment of rent by deposit into Landlord's Bank account. Language of the Notice, specifically "on this one occasion" suggests that such payments were previously accepted. = (501/AJR)
